title: Search & Replace text in the Board
excerpt: Very basic and fundamental functionality is missing in Monday.com. Please add Search & Replace functionality in a Board.

posts.cookedHtml: Very basic and fundamental functionality is missing in Monday.com. Please add Search & Replace functionality in a Board.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @skmdc - maybe you would like to give our Quick Replace app a try? I think it may be the answer to your needs and if not, any feedback is highly appreciated

posts.cookedHtml: Yes, that is very basic! I want to edit in bulk some things and doing it mannually is not viable
